title: cissampelos lycioides
intro: Cissampelos lycioides, also known as the "Lycium vine" or "Snake root," is a plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The health benefits of Cissampelos lycioides include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to treat various health conditions.
